overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a rainy cyberpunk waterfront promenade at night. The camera rises from a puddle reflection and ascends stairs to an elevated walkway lined with palm trees, neon signs, and benches overlooking a dark ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway adjacent to open plaza

events.description: camera rises from ground level puddle view to standing height

agents.ego_description: moving forward while rising from ground level, approaching a set of stairs in a rainy plaza

entered.detail: large water puddle reflecting bright light source
dark concrete structure providing partial cover from rain
rain-slicked concrete surface with reflective sheen
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky
colorful paper trash lying on the wet ground

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a low-angle view of a rain puddle reflecting bright light. The camera rises from ground level and moves forward through a partially covered concrete area toward an open plaza with tall palm trees visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway leading to elevated waterfront

events.description: beginning to ascend concrete stairs toward upper level
reaching the top of stairs and approaching the waterfront railing

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs toward an elevated waterfront promenade

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs leading upward to the promenade level
metal safety railing along the edge of the upper level
dark water visible beyond the railing
tall pole with bright light illuminating the area

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a flight of concrete stairs from the plaza to an elevated waterfront promenade. As it climbs, the ocean becomes visible beyond a metal railing, and the area becomes fully exposed to the rainy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront overlook with ocean view

events.description: turning right to walk along the waterfront promenade
panning view to reveal distant city lights across the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront railing, initially looking out at the ocean then turning to follow the promenade path

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench facing the ocean

entered.detail: concrete benches lined along the promenade edge
faint lights from buildings visible across the dark water

segments.scene_description: Walking along the elevated waterfront promenade with the ocean visible to the right beyond the railing. The camera passes benches where people sit facing the water, then turns to reveal distant city lights across the bay before continuing along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit waterfront promenade with commercial buildings

events.description: passing by pedestrians seated on benches along the railing
character in bright yellow outfit walks past the camera

agents.ego_description: walking along the neon-lit promenade passing by seated pedestrians and a character in a yellow outfit

notable_agents.action: character in yellow clothing walking toward and passing the camera
people sitting on benches along the railing

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens with bright neon colors
modern building with glass windows and neon lighting
metal trash and recycling containers next to benches

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the promenade past commercial buildings adorned with bright neon billboards. The railing is now on the left as the path runs between the ocean and the buildings. The camera passes several people sitting on benches and a character in a distinctive yellow outfit who walks toward and past the camera.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that rises from a rain-slicked ground level to an elevated, neon-lit waterfront promenade. It begins with a low-angle view of a reflecting puddle, ascending from the concrete ground and moving forward through a partially covered area toward a distant plaza of tall palm trees. As the camera climbs a flight of concrete stairs, the scene opens up to the rainy night sky and reveals the dark ocean stretching beyond a metal railing. The perspective then shifts along the elevated walkway, passing benches of people facing the water before turning to capture distant city lights shimmering across the bay. Finally, the path leads past commercial buildings adorned with bright neon billboards, where the camera passes more seated figures and a character in a distinctive yellow outfit walking toward and past the lens.
